name: HEX BOW

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Runed Quiver
abilities.text: Once per activation. When determining its final duel total, this model may add one suit of its choice.

actions.name: Blessed Longbow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or (missile) 12".

triggers.name: Fistful of Arrows
triggers.text: When resolving, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura) 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Light 'Em Up
triggers.text: Once per activation. Another ally may declare a (missile) or (magic) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Clear Away
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

triggers.name: Spellbind
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Target Practice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. X is equal to the distance between this model and target Scheme marker. Remove the target.

triggers.name: Screaming Arrow
triggers.text: When resolving, before the target is removed, enemy models within (aura) 1" of the target must pass a TN 11 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 appears above the characteristics/keywords line
Blessed Longbow range is marked with asterisk (*) and explained in costs_and_restrictions as variable between (melee)1" and (missile)12"
Target Practice has 'X' damage with specific calculation formula in costs_and_restrictions
